---
title: "NonLinear Sigma Model with Topological Term"
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
editor: source
---
This page needs to be better organized -- think about what you want to have. Detailed code analysis should be sub-pages. Is this the page that emphasizes how to do things, with theory as a separate page?

# Simulation and Analysis Code for 2D O(3) Nonlinear Sigma Model with Topological Term Theta

## Monte Carlo + analytic continuation approach

This approach uses a conventional Monte Carlo simulation with a Metropolis step to simulate the 2D O(3) nonlinear sigma model where the topological term theta is assigned an imaginary value.
